battle_traits.name: Death's Descent
battle_traits.description: Your Vargheists unit is not set up during the deployment phase. Instead, from the third battle round onwards, it can use the following ability.

sub_abilities.name: Swoop Down
sub_abilities.description: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.

battle_traits.name: The Hunger
battle_traits.description: Each time a friendly Vampire unit uses a Fight ability, after all of its attacks have been resolved, Heal (X) that Vampire unit where X is the number of damage points allocated by those attacks.

regiment_abilities.name: Endless Legions
regiment_abilities.description: You can set up a replacement unit with D6+4 models anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.
regiment_abilities.declare: Pick a friendly Deathrattle Skeletons unit that has been destroyed.

regiment_abilities.name: Ruinous Chargers
regiment_abilities.description: Inflict D3 mortal damage on each enemy unit it passed across during that Charge ability.
regiment_abilities.declare: Pick your Blood Knights unit to use this ability if it charged this turn.

enhancements.name: Grave-Sand Shard
enhancements.description: Add 1 to each legion roll made for that unit.

enhancements.name: Cloud of Bats
enhancements.description: Remove your general from the battlefield and set them up again anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.

enhancements.name: Aura of Night
enhancements.description: Ignore negative modifiers to save rolls for shooting attacks that target your general.

enhancements.name: Spirit Gale
enhancements.description: On a 7+, inflict 1 mortal damage on each enemy unit on the battlefield.

passive_abilities.name: Vile Transference
passive_abilities.description: Pick a visible enemy unit within 6" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6. On a 6+, roll a number of dice equal to the target's Health characteristic. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target and Heal (1) this unit.
passive_abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 6" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

passive_abilities.name: Riders of Ruin
passive_abilities.description: Models in this unit can pass across enemy Infantry models as if this unit had Fly.

passive_abilities.name: The Scent of Gore
passive_abilities.description: Add 1 to wound rolls for attacks made by this unit that target a damaged unit.

passive_abilities.name: Skeleton Legion
passive_abilities.description: For each slain model from this unit, make a legion roll of D6. For each 5+, return 1 slain model to this unit.
